items.title: Intel Exec Sells $4 Million in Stock After Record-Breaking Rally
items.summary: A securities filing shows executive vice president and chief legal officer April Miller Boise sold 40,256 shares on Fri., May 1. Miller Boise last sold Intel stock on Jan. 31, when she offloaded 20,000 shares.
